targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_kw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_kw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_status" and r._field == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_kw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_factor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_kw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "flow_rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Idle Waste — Machines Idle but Consuming Power

targets.query:
idle = from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_status" and r._field == "state" and r._value == "idle")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["machine_id", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "status"})

power = from(bucket: "energy_data")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "machine_power" and r._field == "power_kw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.machine_id, set: ${machine_id:json}))
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.5)
  |> keep(columns: ["machine_id", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "power_kw"})

join(tables: {i: idle, p: power}, on: ["machine_id"])
  |> count(column: "power_kw")
